comments.body:
@mtrmac FYI https://github.com/docker/docker/pull/24213

going to merge this after tests

> @mtrmac FYI docker/docker#24213

Cool, thanks!

This looks fairly big; what does this do to `skopeo` binary size? In any case, whatever the number is, LGTM to merge.

> This looks fairly big; what does this do to skopeo binary size?

I'll try and report some numbers in a moment but getting rid of a forked piece of code is somehow worth the additional memory mapping during a skopeo run :cry:
Sure, as I said, LGTM whatever the result is.
